notableEvents.label: Adrian Del Castillo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Adrian Del Castillo grounds into a double play, second baseman Marcus Semien to shortstop Bo Bichette to first baseman Mark Vientos. Corbin Carroll out at 2nd. Adrian Del Castillo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ryan Waldschmidt pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ryan Waldschmidt singles on a line drive to left fielder Juan Soto.
